name: Isaac Damon (Fallout OC)
description:
Isaac Damon was born 2056, 22th october in Nevada which makes him 21 year old when the bombs dropped. He worked as a radio host in his prewar time. After the bombs dropped he and his family fled to an disclosed vault (which i will not change as if new fallout media come out i may accidently name a new vault that alr exists) and got cryopodded for 30 years, waking up in 2107. he lived a "normal" life underground until 11 years after that he and his vault mates got out for reclemation day. He pretty quickly got lost and found his way to the Brotherhood of Steel. Quickly rising up the ranks and becoming a knight, that wouldnt last long as on one of his missions had him in a toxic waste depository. He accidently got out of his armor ghoulifing him, which made the brotherhood exile him. he wandered the wastes until finding out about ncr forming, after which he joined them and as well quickly rose up to become a ranger veteran.

Isaac has built himself a lil shack near the ncr outpost in which he resides and stores his gear

hes also refered to as izzy by fellow ncr troops which he hates

LIKES:

-NCR for giving him a chance even though hes a ghoul which is percived as being an abomination by most other factions

-chems like psycho, buffout and jet, he dosent accept the idea hes called an addict and claims its for battle purposes

-hunting in his free time, he loves the taste of grilled gecko meat

-being truthful, even if it means hes being mean

-firearms

DISLIKES

-The Brotherhood Of Steel, as they kicked him out for being a ghoul and wishes he can get revenge at them

-being called his nickname "Izzy" which drives him nuts

-Ceasars Legion, he claims that their use of crude weaponery is idiotic

he also modded his guns a bit, and in his freetime he fixes and modifies some of the other troops weaponery

he keeps his old BOS power armor in his shack but he re colored it to fit in with the NCR

hes also built himself a little farm, he practices aim on old sarsaparilla (i may have butchered the name ) bottles on the fence which surrounds the said farm

he found himself an old radio and managed to make it work, letting him go back to his old job of a radio host.
creator: cheese boi
